title: Everbuild Fix and Fill Quick Setting Expanding Foam, 500 ml
features: Quick setting expanding foam that expands on application up to 55 times its original volume
Cures in only 1 hour in a 20°C environment and once cured can be cut, sawn or plastered over if required

Supplied with an attachable nozzle for simple application making it ideal for filling deep joints, irregular gaps, gaps around pipe entries, window frames or door frames and wire chasing electrical cables
Also suitable for providing sound deadening or insulation behind cladding to exterior walls or behind soffit and barge boards
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Ensure all surfaces are clean, sound and free from dust and loose particles. Moisten surfaces to be sealed with water. This assists the curing process. Shake can well before use (about 20 times). Carefully fix nozzle. Do not overtighten or force. Extract the foam by pressing the trigger. IMPORTANT – Reuse is only possible by cleaning the nozzle and valve tip with Everbuild Foam Cleaner before the foam has cured. Do not push any object into the valve as the contents may explode.
